body.title: CLOSED: swarm visibility rules — profile field, manifest field, shared guarantee
body.result: visibility field + shared guarantee; 10 tests; commit 4ae3bfd
body.description:
Implement the channel visibility model: primary agents (the one running on the local box) are visible everywhere; secondary agents (on remote boxes) are opt-in visible. The `shared` channel is always present for all participants. Web UI renders as horizontal tabs.

**Affected files:** agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/announce/profile.py, agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/announce/manifest.py
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** IN — visibility flag (primary/secondary) on device profile, `shared` channel always-on guarantee, tab ordering rule (primary first, secondary by opt-in order). OUT — actual web tab rendering (T-swarm-web-tab-ui); per-user ACL overrides (deferred).
**Test plan:** unit tests — primary device profile has visibility=primary; secondary has visibility=secondary; manifest listing filters by visibility flag; shared channel present in every device's channel list regardless of visibility.
**Pass condition:** Device manifest for a remote box shows secondary visibility; querying available channels always includes `shared` regardless of which device profile is loaded.
